items.riskNote: Public sanitized resume route; keep identity-only fields out of the page.

zh.title: 通用一页简历
zh.desc: 用于快速介绍教育背景、核心荣誉、项目经历和技能结构。
zh.usage: 通用自我介绍、老师初筛、同学合作、线上链接补充。

en.title: General One-Page Resume
en.desc: A compact overview of education, honors, projects, and skills.
en.usage: General introduction, quick review, collaboration, and profile links.

items.riskNote: Academic route is public; evidence links should remain curated and non-local.

zh.title: 保研评优版简历
zh.desc: 突出 GPA、排名、奖学金、竞赛奖项、学生工作与志愿服务。
zh.usage: 保研预备、奖学金评审、三好学生、综合素质评定。

en.title: Academic Review Resume
en.desc: Focused on GPA, ranking, scholarship, competitions, leadership, and service.
en.usage: Academic review, scholarship screening, and comprehensive evaluation.

items.riskNote: Career route is public; keep contact fields limited to reviewed public channels.

zh.title: 求职实习版简历
zh.desc: 突出数学建模、Python、Astro 网站、AI 工具链和项目落地能力。
zh.usage: 实习投递、项目合作、技术能力展示、GitHub 主页链接。

en.title: Internship Resume
en.desc: Focused on modeling, Python, Astro, AI toolchains, and implementation.
en.usage: Internship applications, project collaboration, and GitHub profile links.

items.riskNote: Certificate images are public-facing but should be reviewed before broad forwarding.

zh.title: 证明材料墙
zh.desc: 集中展示已筛选的奖项证书与荣誉证明，支持点击查看大图。
zh.usage: 核验奖项真实性、补充评审材料、核对公开证书图片。

en.title: Certificate Gallery
en.desc: A curated gallery for certificates and award evidence.
en.usage: Award verification, review support, and public certificate checking.

items.riskNote: Project narrative is public; tie award claims to structured evidence.

zh.title: 数学建模项目说明
zh.desc: 说明建模训练如何转化为问题抽象、数据分析、论文表达和团队协作能力。
zh.usage: 项目面试、竞赛经历解释、科研能力补充说明。

en.title: Modeling Project Case
en.desc: Explains how modeling practice maps to abstraction, analysis, writing, and teamwork.
en.usage: Project interviews, competition explanation, and research-potential review.

items.riskNote: Workflow narrative is public, but private vault contents and raw literature files must stay unpublished.

zh.title: AI 辅助科研学习与知识管理案例
zh.desc: 说明如何使用 AI 工具、Zotero、Obsidian、Markdown 与 LaTeX 组织文献阅读和研究表达。
zh.usage: 科研兴趣说明、项目作品集、AI 工具链展示、学习方法复盘。
zh.status: 工作流案例，待补公开证据

en.title: AI-KM Workflow Case
en.desc: Explains how AI tools, Zotero, Obsidian, Markdown, and LaTeX support literature reading and research communication.
en.usage: Research-interest explanation, portfolio review, AI workflow showcase, and learning reflection.

items.riskNote: Research direction is public but still needs stronger project evidence before being treated as a proof-backed claim.

zh.title: ChemAI Lab 方向页
zh.desc: 展示 AI 辅助化学研究、计算化学和机器学习工具链的长期学习方向。
zh.usage: 科研兴趣说明、AI 化学方向展示、长期项目规划。

en.title: ChemAI Lab Direction
en.desc: Shows the long-term learning direction in AI-assisted chemistry and computational tools.
en.usage: Research-interest explanation, AI chemistry profile, and long-term planning.

items.riskNote: Formal application packet must stay local; never add a public route or href.

zh.title: 上海有机所夏令营申请材料
zh.desc: 正式投递版可能包含完整身份字段和完整证明材料，默认只在本地生成和投递。
zh.usage: 夏令营申请、导师邮件附件、材料系统上传、完整证明材料合并。

en.title: SIOC Summer Program Packet
en.desc: The formal packet may contain complete identity fields and full proof files, so it stays local by default.
en.usage: Summer program application, advisor email attachment, upload packet, and merged proof files.
